name: Hamilton Pool Preserve
description: Natural swimming hole with 45-foot waterfall and spring-fed pool. Crystal clear water and excellent for swimming.

name: Ice Lake
description: High alpine lake with cold, crystal clear water. Popular with swimmers seeking pristine mountain swimming.

name: Laurel Falls Swimming Hole
description: Beautiful waterfall swimming hole in Great Smoky Mountains with rope swing and clear water.

name: Elk Knob Swimming Hole
description: Mountain stream swimming hole with clear cold water and excellent hiking access.

name: Devils Eyebrow
description: Ozark Mountain swimming hole with scenic bluff views and natural spring water.

name: Clear Creek Falls
description: Scenic waterfall and plunge pool in the Oregon Cascades. Cold mountain water and pristine setting.

name: Emerald Lake
description: High altitude lake with stunning mountain views and excellent water quality for summer swimming.

name: Spy Rock Swimming Hole
description: Mountain stream swimming hole in the Appalachians with excellent water quality.

name: Plunge Pool at Kaaterskill Falls
description: Historic swimming hole beneath 260-foot waterfall in the Catskill Mountains.

name: Barton Springs Pool
description: Spring-fed swimming hole in Zilker Park with consistent 68-degree water year-round.
